summary: OpenAI-compatible client failed until /v1 suffix was added to base URL.
Some advertised models were not enabled for the account key.
Function calling succeeded on one model but another returned invalid tool arguments.
Streaming worked but first-token latency varied significantly by model.
Cost field was absent from provider response; token usage was present.
Langfuse trace missing because request bypassed LiteLLM proxy.
Sequential benchmark avoided rate limits; concurrent run hit 429.
A fast model returned markdown around JSON and failed strict schema validation.
